summary: Implemented root AppModel that composes all sub-models (Sessions, CallTree, Detail, Dashboard, Diagnosis, StatusBar) into the final TUI application. Manages focus cycling (Tab: Sessions→CallTree→Detail→Sessions), direct-access keys (1/2), view switching (s toggles Dashboard, d opens Diagnosis modal), session selection flow (SessionSelectMsg→CallTree load), call tree node selection→Detail panel update, diagnosis jump-back→auto-expand turn and scroll, real-time monitoring pipeline (WatcherEventMsg→ParseIncremental→CallTree.AddEntry), monitoring toggle (m key), language switch (L key), and terminal resize with small-terminal warning (< 80x24).
keyDecisions: AppModel uses value receiver pattern matching all sub-models (SessionsModel, CallTreeModel, DetailModel, etc.)
ActivePanel enum (PanelSessions, PanelCallTree, PanelDetail) tracks focus state; ActiveView enum (ViewMain, ViewDashboard, ViewDiagnosis) tracks view state
's' key handled globally in main view (not delegated to call tree) so dashboard toggle works from any panel
handleCallTreeKey intercepts cmd() return values to detect app-level messages (DiagnosisRequestMsg, DashboardToggleMsg, MonitoringToggleMsg)
handleDashboardKeys similarly intercepts SessionSelectMsg from picker
setFocus() pointer-receiver method updates focused state on all three panels atomically
NewAppModel initializes focus state by calling setFocus(PanelSessions)
Terminal resize calculates: sessionsWidth=25%, callTreeHeight=67% of content, detailHeight=remainder, statusBar=1 line
Resize warning rendered as full-screen bright yellow text when width<80 or height<24
JumpBackMsg handler iterates turns to find target line, auto-expands parent turn, positions cursor on target node
Status bar mode transitions: ViewMain→Normal, ViewDashboard→Dashboard, ViewDiagnosis→Diagnosis
WatcherEventMsg wraps watcher events for Bubble Tea message passing; handleWatcherEvent parses new lines via ParseIncremental and adds to call tree with flash
handleWatcherEvent guards: only processes when monitoring=true and file matches current session

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: internal/model/app.go implements AppModel as root Bubble Tea model
Three-panel layout: left Sessions (25%) + right CallTree (upper 67%) + bottom Detail (lower 33%) + StatusBar (1 line)
Focus cycling: Sessions → CallTree → Detail → Sessions (Tab key)
View switching: s toggles Dashboard overlay, d opens Diagnosis modal
Session selection flow: Sessions model emits event → AppModel loads call tree via parser → CallTree updates
Call tree node selection → Detail panel loads node content
Diagnosis modal: on Enter jump-back, auto-expands parent Turn and scrolls to node
Real-time monitoring: watcher events → ParseIncremental → CallTree adds nodes
Terminal resize: recalculate panel widths/heights, display warning if < 80x24
q key quits from main view, closes modal from overlay views
L key switches language (calls SetLocale, all models re-render)
Integration tests: full session flow (load → navigate → detail → diagnosis → dashboard)
